zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger Bernard III De Foix於1243年出生在法國奧其坦尼阿利艾福瓦時，他的父親Comte. Roger IV de Foix41歲，母親Brunissende de Cardona34歲。他於1262年10月4日與Marguerite De Bearn在法國努維勒-阿吉泰洛吉吉加洛萊拉可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1303年3月3日在法國米迪-列內斯阿利艾福瓦塔拉斯康-素爾-阿利艾享年60歲，埋葬在法國米迪-列內斯豪-加洛希特加貝勒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger Bernard III De Foix于1243年出生在法国奧其坦尼阿利艾福瓦时，他的父亲Comte. Roger IV de Foix41岁，母亲Brunissende de Cardona34岁。他于1262年10月4日与Marguerite De Bearn在法国努維勒-阿吉泰洛吉吉加洛萊拉可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1303年3月3日在法国米迪-列內斯阿利艾福瓦塔拉斯康-素爾-阿利艾享年60岁，埋葬在法国米迪-列內斯豪-加洛希特加貝勒。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Foix
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Swiss French: unexplained. In Switzerland it is found mainly in the Valais Canton.
Catalan: nickname from moix with various possible meanings, including ‘cat’, ‘drunk’, and ‘lame’.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

nameMeanings.name: Bernard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from ber(n) ‘bear’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. This was the name of three famous medieval churchmen: St Bernard of Menthon ( 923–1008 ), founder of a hospice on each of the Alpine passes named after him; the monastic reformer St Bernard of Clairvaux ( 1090–1153 ); and the scholastic philosopher Bernard of Chartres. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. A native Old English form, Beornheard, was superseded by the Norman form.

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger Bernard III De Foix was born in 1243, in Foix, Ariège, Occitanie, France, his father, Comte. Roger IV de Foix, was 41 and his mother, Brunissende de Cardona, was 34. He married Marguerite De Bearn on 4 October 1262, in Layrac, Lot-et-Garonne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He died on 3 March 1303, in Tarascon-sur-Ariège, Foix, Ariège, Midi-Pyrénées, France, at the age of 60, and was buried in Cintegabelle, Haute-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger Bernard III De Foix est né en 1243, à Foix, Ariège, Occitanie, France, son père, Comte. Roger IV de Foix, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Brunissende de Cardona, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Marguerite De Bearn le 4 octobre 1262, à Layrac, Lot-et-Garonne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 3 mars 1303, à Tarascon-sur-Ariège, Foix, Ariège, Midi-Pyrénées, France, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à Cintegabelle, Haute-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger Bernard III De Foix 1243 in Foix, Ariège, Occitanie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Comte. Roger IV de Foix 41 und seine Mutter Brunissende de Cardona 34. Er hat am 4. Oktober 1262 in Layrac, Lot-et-Garonne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich Marguerite De Bearn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 3. März 1303 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Tarascon-sur-Ariège, Foix, Ariège, Midi-Pyrénées, Frankreich und wurde in Cintegabelle, Haute-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Bernard III De Foix è nato il nel 1243 nel Foix, Ariège, Occitanie, Francia, il suo padre, Comte. Roger IV de Foix, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Brunissende de Cardona, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Marguerite De Bearn il 4 ottobre 1262, nel Layrac, Lot-et-Garonne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì il 3 marzo 1303, nel Tarascon-sur-Ariège, Foix, Ariège, Midi-Pyrénées, Francia, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolto a Cintegabelle, Haute-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger Bernard III De Foixが1243年にフランスオクシタニーアリeッジフォイックスで生まれた時，父Comte. Roger IV de Foixは41歳，母Brunissende de Cardonaは34歳であった。1262年10月4日にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインロト-エト-ガーオンレイラックでMarguerite De Bearnと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1303年3月3日にフランスミディ-プイルeンeスアリeッジフォイックスターアスコン-スル-アリeッジで60歳で死去し，フランスミディ-プイルeンeスハウテ-ガーオンシンテガベルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger Bernard III De Foix(이)가 1243년 프랑스 옥시탠이 애리e지 포이스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Comte. Roger IV de Foix(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Brunissende de Cardona(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1262년 10월 4일 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 로트-트-가니 레이라크에서 Marguerite De Bearn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1303년 3월 3일 프랑스 미디-p이ee스 애리e지 포이스 태라스콘-수-아리e지에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 미디-p이ee스 하테-가니 신테가벨에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Bernard III De Foix nasceu em 1243, em Foix, Ariège, Occitanie, França, seu pai, Comte. Roger IV de Foix, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Brunissende de Cardona, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Marguerite De Bearn em 4 de outubro de 1262, em Layrac, Lot-et-Garonne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 3 de março de 1303, em Tarascon-sur-Ariège, Foix, Ariège, Midi-Pyrénées, França, com 60 anos, e foi sepultado em Cintegabelle, Haute-Garonne, Midi-Pyrénées, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger Bernard III De Foix родился в 1243 г. в местности фоикс, ариeдж, окситани, Франция, его отцу по имени Comte. Roger IV de Foix было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Brunissende de Cardona, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Marguerite De Bearn 4 октября 1262 г. в местности леирак, лот-ет-гаронн, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Он умер 3 марта 1303 г. в местности тараскон-сур-ариeдж, фоикс, ариeдж, миди-пирeнeесь, Франция в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности синтегабелл, хауте-гаронн, миди-пирeнeесь, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger Bernard III De Foix nació en 1243, en Foix, Ariège, Occitanie, Francia, su papá, Comte. Roger IV de Foix, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Brunissende de Cardona, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Marguerite De Bearn el 4 de octubre de 1262, en Layrac, Lot-et-Garonne, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió el 3 de marzo de 1303, en Tarascon-sur-Ariège, Foix, Ariège, Mediodía-Pirineos, Francia, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultado en Cintegabelle, Haute-Garonne, Mediodía-Pirineos, Francia.
